subject: [PATCH v5 4/4] cleanup: Remove NULL check from unconditional guards

reviews.author: Peter Zijlstra (Intel)
reviews.summary: The patch is a cleanup effort that removes unnecessary NULL checks from unconditional lock guards. The changes are based on an audit of all instances of these guards and have been verified to be safe.

2026-06-05.patch_summary: The patch removes unnecessary NULL checks from unconditional lock guards in the Linux kernel, improving performance and reducing code complexity.
